name: Synup Office Hour #2:19 de marzo de 2024
episode_summary: __POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__Join our "Office Hour #2" webinar series for key insights into local search optimization. Learn to enhance Google My Business (GMB) profiles with social media, navigate Google's Helpful Content Guidelines, understand the impact of Core Web Vitals on rankings, and manage GMB profile suspensions effectively. Whether you're an agency, reseller, or looking to boost your own web presence, our webinars offer valuable strategies and a community of experts. Register now to stay ahead in digital marketing and local search.
episode_summary_rich_text:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__
  • Social Media on GMB Profiles: Social posts from Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn now appear on GMB profiles of linked businesses, boosting Google visibility.
  • Helpful Content Guidelines: Google advises removing or refining poor content to improve other pages' search rankings, focusing on a page-level evaluation.
  • Core Web Vitals: Achieving perfect Core Web Vitals scores isn't necessary for top rankings; focus on content and usability improvements instead.
  • GMB Profile Suspensions: Provides strategies for handling GMB suspensions, including understanding common causes and following Google's reinstatement process.
    ‍

We discussed Google listing suspensions, Social posts showing up in GBP, and a lot more. Tune in!

· Get the event deck here
· Get the event notes here
